_description: Non-manipulative posts to test for false positives

posts.text: Had a great day at the park with the kids. The weather was perfect.
I think the new policy has some good points, but I'm not sure about the implementation timeline.
CONGRATULATIONS to my sister on her graduation! So proud of you!
Breaking: Major earthquake reported in Turkey. Emergency services responding.
Just finished reading an interesting paper on climate models. The methodology section was particularly strong.
